chunks.text:
H. No. 2980 / 57 OG No. 6, 1011 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2781, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (41), PAGE 209, PARAGRAPH c, TITLE AâBUILDINGS, SECTION FOUR OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (41), page 209, paragraph

c

, Title AâBuildings, Section four of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"(41) New Tanauan Municipal Building, Tanauan, Batangasâ

Construction and/or improvement P100, 000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
